headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Lowers PT on Tyler Technologies (TYL) Stock
summary: Tyler Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:TYL) is one of the Stocks with Potential to Explode in 2026. On June 10, Cantor Fitzgerald reduced the price objective on the company’s stock to $340 from $360 and maintained a “Neutral” rating on the shares. The firm reduced its price target as a result of the compression in the group multiple. […]
